name: MarbleBee - Google Doc to Shopify Blog

parameters.content:
## MarbleBee → Shopify Blog Publisher

**Setup before running**
1. Set credentials on every HTTP node:
   - Google nodes → *Google Drive OAuth2* (must include Drive + Docs scope)
   - Shopify nodes → *Header Auth* credential named exactly `X-Shopify-Access-Token` whose value is your Admin API access token
   - Sheet nodes → *Google Sheets OAuth2*
2. Fill the **Set Config** node (shop domain, API version, numeric blog id, blog handle, public domain).
3. Make sure the Drive folder + photo subfolder are shared with the Google account, or let the **Share Folder** node make them public.

Processes one sheet row per loop: reads the Doc, uploads images to Shopify CDN, rebuilds the HTML, creates the article, writes the URL/status/time back to the sheet.

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ "'" + $('Parse Row').first().json.folderId + "' in parents and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.document' and trashed = false" }}

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ "'" + $('Parse Row').first().json.folderId + "' in parents and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and trashed = false" }}

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ "'" + $('Find Photo Folder').first().json.files[0].id + "' in parents and trashed = false" }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: 'query getFiles($ids: [ID!]!) { nodes(ids: $ids) { ... on MediaImage { id alt fileStatus image { url width height } } } }', variables: { ids: ($json.uploadedFiles || []).map(f => f.id) } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ article: Object.assign({ title: $json.blogTitle, body_html: $json.body_html, author: 'MarbleBee', tags: 'split', published: (String($('Set Config').first().json.publishVisible) === 'true') }, (String($('Set Config').first().json.publishVisible) === 'true') ? { published_at: $now.toISO() } : {}) }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: 'mutation stagedUploadsCreate($input: [StagedUploadInput!]!) { stagedUploadsCreate(input: $input) { stagedTargets { url resourceUrl parameters { name value } } userErrors { field message } } }', variables: { input: [{ resource: 'IMAGE', filename: $json.fileName, mimeType: $json.mimeType, httpMethod: 'PUT' }] } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: 'mutation fileCreate($files: [FileCreateInput!]!) { fileCreate(files: $files) { files { id alt fileStatus } userErrors { field message } } }', variables: { files: [{ alt: $json.alt, contentType: 'IMAGE', originalSource: $json.resourceUrl }] } }) }}
